song.title: Glorious Freedom
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Once I was bound by sin’s galling fetters; Chained like a slave I struggled in vain. But I received a glorious freedom, When Jesus broke my fetters in twain.
[C] Chorus Glorious freedom! Wonderful freedom! No more in chains of sin I repine! Jesus the glorious Emancipator— Now and forever He shall be mine.
[V2] 2) Freedom from all the carnal affections, Freedom from envy, hatred and strife; Freedom from vain and worldly ambitions, Freedom from all that saddened my life!
[V3] 3) Freedom from pride and all sinful follies, Freedom from love and glitter of gold; Freedom from evil temper and anger; Glorious freedom, rapture untold!
[V4] 4) Freedom from fear with all of its torments, Freedom from care with all of its pain; Freedom in Christ my blessed Redeemer— He who has rent my fetters in twain.
song.author: Haldor Lillenas
